zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Susannah Leigh於1300年出生。她和Sir John De Assheton Knt至少有1個女兒。她去世於1379年享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret Susannah Leigh于1300年出生。她和Sir John De Assheton Knt至少有1个女儿。她去世于1379年享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Leigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

variants.name: Leah
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 李 and 利, see   Li   1 and 3.

variants.name: Lee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sang, Jae, Jong, Jung, Sung, Yong, Kyung, Seung, Dong, Kwang, Myung.

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a meadow or a patch of arable land, Middle English lee, lea, from Old English lēa, dative case (used after a preposition) of lēah, which originally meant ‘wood or glade’.

English: habitational name from any of the many places in England named with Old English lēah ‘wood, glade’, including Lee in Buckinghamshire, Essex, Hampshire, Kent, and Shropshire, and Lea in Cheshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Lancashire, Lincolnshire, and Wiltshire.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta

There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. nameMeanings.name: Susannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Susanna  , in  2003  the most common in this group of names. It is the form of the name used in the Old Testament. The tale of Susannah, wife of  Joachim , and the elders who falsely accused her of adultery, is to be found in the apocryphal book that bears her name, and was popular in the Middle Ages and later.

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Susannah Leigh was born in 1300. She had at least 1 daughter with Sir John De Assheton Knt. She died in 1379, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Susannah Leigh est née en 1300. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Sir John De Assheton Knt. Elle est décédée en 1379, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret Susannah Leigh wurde 1300 geboren. Sie hatte mit Sir John De Assheton Knt mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1379 im Alter von 79 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret Susannah Leigh è nata il nel 1300. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Sir John De Assheton Knt. Morì nel 1379, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Susannah Leighは1300年に生まれた。彼女はSir John De Assheton Kntとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1379年に79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Susannah Leigh(은)는 1300년 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir John De Assheton Knt(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1379년 79세의 나이로 사망했다.
